name: obsidian-tsdb-plugin
description: Local time series database for plugin metrics, embedded PromQL charts, Prometheus scraping, and Prometheus-compatible queries

scripts.build: npm run check && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run test --if-present && npm run verify-release
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Daniel Grossmann-Kavanagh
